arts.sum: Monza have officially announced the acquisition of Gaetano Castrovilli from Lazio on a loan deal that will run until the end of the current season. The Italian midfielder's move to the Biancorossi was finalized swiftly, with the player having already signed his contract on Thursday, January 30th. The post OFFICIAL: Monza Sign Gaetano Castrovilli appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Monza v Verona: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Monza prepare to host Verona in a pivotal Serie A match, both teams are dealing with significant squad adjustments due to transfers, injuries, and suspensions. The post Serie A | Monza v Verona: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Monza vs. Hellas Verona: no room for error
arts.sum: Monza have kept clean sheets in both matches at the U-Power Stadium against Hellas Verona in Serie A (2-0 win on 6 November 2022 and 0-0 draw on 11 February 2024) and have kept more clean sheets at home against no other team in the competition (two also against Salernitana). After winning the reverse fixture without conceding a goal (3-0, on 21 October), Hellas Verona could become the fifth team against which Monza have won both Serie A matches of the season with a clean sheet, after Juventus and Spezia in 2022/23 and Sassuolo and Salernitana in 2023/24.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Monza v Verona: Match Preview
arts.sum: The fight for Serie A survival intensifies this Saturday as bottom-placed Monza welcomes 17th-placed Hellas Verona to the U-Power Stadium. With both teams desperate for points, this match could prove pivotal in determining their fate for the remainder of the season. arts.ttl: Monza Await Milan’s Green Light for Camarda Loan Deal
arts.sum: In a surprising turn of events in the January transfer window, Monza are on the verge of securing the services of AC Milan's teenage sensation Francesco Camarda. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the Brianza-based club are awaiting Milan's approval for a short-term loan deal that could see the young striker bolster their attacking options in their fight for Serie A survival. The post Monza Await Milan’s Green Light for Camarda Loan Deal appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Done Deal: Daniel Maldini to Join Atalanta
arts.sum: In a significant transfer move, Atalanta has successfully secured the services of Daniel Maldini from Monza. The talented Italian playmaker is set to don the iconic black and blue stripes, marking a new chapter in his promising career under the guidance of Gian Piero Gasperini. The post Done Deal: Daniel Maldini to Join Atalanta appeared first on FootItalia.com.
